name: MotionSites

name: Viktor Oddy — Claude Design full course

name: RoundtableSpace — AI landing pages look the same
summary: Tutorial/signpost on avoiding generic AI-made landing pages through references, rules, typography, spacing, hierarchy, and design docs.

aluma: Useful for building credible lead-gen pages that do not look like generic AI SaaS.
next: Create DR Prepper landing-page DESIGN.md and conversion checklist.

name: Higgsfield AI MCP
